nasb.text: Keep me from the jaws of the trap which they have set for me, And from the snares of those who do iniquity.

esv.text: Keep me from the trap that they have laid for me and from the snares of evildoers!

cnv.text: 求你保護我脫離惡人為我所設的網羅， 和作孽的人的圈套。

ccb.text: 求你不要使我落入恶人设下的网罗， 不要掉进他们的陷阱。

csbs.text: 求你保守我脱离恶人为我所设的网罗， 脱离那些做坏事之人的陷阱。
